description: S3 bucket has public read/write access allowed via ACLs.
recommendation: Disable public access blocks and restrict bucket policies.

description: Security Group allows unrestricted inbound access (0.0.0.0/0) on port 22 (SSH).
recommendation: Restrict port 22 access to specific IP ranges or use Session Manager.

description: IAM user has console access but MFA is not enabled.
recommendation: Enforce MFA for all IAM users with console access.

description: Access keys have not been used in the last 90 days.
recommendation: Rotate or delete unused access keys.
Enable versioning to protect against accidental deletion.

description: Security Group allows unrestricted inbound access (0.0.0.0/0) on port 3389 (RDP).
recommendation: Restrict port 3389 access to internal subnets or trusted VPNs.

description: IAM user has inline policies attached instead of managed policies.
recommendation: Use managed IAM policies for better access management.
